mainEntity.name: What if my New York law firm ignores AEO?
mainEntity.text: What if my New York law firm ignores AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ignoring AEO means New York firms miss AI overviews and voice traffic, ceding leads to optimized competitors in high-stakes searches.[1][4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Competitors embracing AEO dominate zero-click results; your firm drops in visibility. Start with 10 FAQ pages using NY keywords. Long-term, this erodes client acquisition in saturated NYC market—insurers/opponents won't directly use, but lost leads hurt.[1][4]

name: Risks of Ignoring AEO in New York
description: Ignoring AEO means New York firms miss AI overviews and voice traffic, ceding leads to optimized competitors in high-stakes searches.[1][4]
